# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    global: true
    config:
      origins: "http://example.com, https://example.com"
      methods: "GET, POST, OPTIONS"
      headers: "Accept, Content-Type, Authorization"
      exposed_headers: "X-My-Custom-Header"
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600

services:
  - name: my-api-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: "http://myapp.com, https://myapp.com"
          methods: "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS"
          headers: "Accept, Content-Type"
          max_age: 86400

      - name: auth
        config:
          type: "key-auth"
          hide_credentials: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 5
          hour: 1000
          limit_by: "consumer"
          
routes:
  - name: my-api-route
    service: my-api-service
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 60
          limit_by: "request"
      - name: auth
        config:
          key_names: ["apikey"]
          hide_credentials: true
